Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Processor]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — The Zenith Processor is a title or identity held by Void Prism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — The Zenith Processor is a mysterious entity that hosts the meeting and uses an avatar made of shimmering yellow sparks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — The Zenith Processor is a type of Zenith Device appearing as an AI projection of yellow lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — The Zenith Processor is used to vet new recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — The Zenith Processor is an object Varic is tracking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — The Zenith Processor is capable of making predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — The Zenith Processor guided Lichborn wizards in creating a counterspell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Zenith Processor communicates via Subline calls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Zenith Processor helped Solstice prevent The Last Horizon from following.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — The Zenith Processor is associated with Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Void Prism is the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Zenith Processor can counteract teleportation magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Zenith Processor is a Device.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Information and support poured through the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Zenith Processor makes Solstice members difficult to pin down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — The Zenith Processor is the same as Void Prism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — The Zenith Processor is a device that receives data from Lutoch Terelle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — The enemy possesses the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Zenith Processor was not involved in the store explosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — The Zenith Processor is an entity residing within Lutoch Terelle's skull.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Lutoch feels the protective network of Aethertech through her connection to the Zenith Processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Being fully bonded to the Zenith Processor provides protection against mental magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — A captive from Solstice has the Zenith Processor in her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Zenith Processor likely organized the Subspace lock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The Zenith Processor warned that the speaker had doomed themselves and the galaxy.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
